name: a CTP native detector finding (rule id starting g-) groups under that CTP rule id directly rather than being namespaced
command: printf '%s' '{"version":"2.1.0","runs":[{"tool":{"driver":{"name":"json-syntax"}},"results":[{"ruleId":"g-json-valid","level":"error","message":{"text":"invalid"}}]}]}' > a.sarif && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/group-findings-by-rule.sh" --dir . --json 2>/dev/null | node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(0,"utf8"));process.exit(j.rules["g-json-valid"]?0:1)' && echo ctp-native-keeps-its-id 1>&2
